reason: ISS-2311 asks whether EXP-438's closure of HOL-NARRATIVE c2 hole 3 is epistemically complete or merely procedurally complete. The recommendation is to acknowledge a trade-off in the closure record — specifically that the visible-rationale strategy closes the 'future curmudgeon re-flagging' problem but not the deeper 'is the argument coherent' problem. This is a judgment call about how to characterize the quality of a previous closure, not a mechanical text fix. Requires Opus analyst to assess whether the current closure is adequate or needs an addendum.
